name: Recording a CLI run creates run evidence
description: When a builder records a TestSprite CLI run, the app should show the run in the CLI runs view and create linked evidence for the loop.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the LoopLedger live app
In the CLI run form, enter the label TestSprite first cloud run
Enter the command testsprite test create --plan-from .testsprite/plans/01-default-workspace.json --run --wait --output json
Set the run status to passed
Enter the notes Cloud run evidence recorded from the TestSprite CLI loop
Verify the recorded CLI runs section shows TestSprite first cloud run
Verify the recorded CLI run shows the passed status
